'''Redkihl Rokk's Pirates''' were [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] dedicated to serving with [[Redkihl Rokk]] on the ''[[Hungry Ghost]]''. Many of them almost killed [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] when he crash-landed his [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wing]] into the hangar.
